issues.description: Action type is 'Rest' but card text says 'returns 1 DON!! card from their field to their DON!! deck'. Should be 'ReturnToHand' or similar return mechanic, not Rest. Rest only untaps/unexhausts cards.
Target is 'OpponentLeader' but text specifies '1 DON!! card from their field'. Should target opponent's DON cards on field, not the leader itself.
